title: dampiera ramosa
intro: Dampiera ramosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae, commonly known as the alpine forget-me-not. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain a range of bioactive compounds with potential antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dampiera ramosa include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Traditionally, the leaves are prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, often used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and gastrointestinal issues.
